name: manual_c322d3
claim: Tempire prices are stored in cents (integer) in Supabase. The single source of truth for conversion is: divide by 100 exactly once, at the display layer in JSX. Never create an intermediate variable that pre-divides and then divide again in the template string.

decisions.notes: Double-division bug in ProductCard.tsx caused all prices to display at 1/100th of their actual value. Victor caught this in manual testing. The correct pattern is: const price = product.price (raw cents), then in JSX use (price / 100).toFixed(2).

rationale: Double-division bug in ProductCard.tsx caused all prices to display at 1/100th of their actual value. Victor caught this in manual testing. The correct pattern is: const price = product.price (raw cents), then in JSX use (price / 100).toFixed(2).
